meaning: v.长声尖叫,告密,抱怨,激烈抗议n.长而尖的声音
examples: Mahone calls Michael to warn him and to explain that he won't squeal.
He stopped with a squeal of brakes.
He heard tyres squeal as the car braked to avoid a collision.
She heard the squeal of the hinge and smelled his damp jacket in the corridor.
And they can be expected to squeal loudly when they receive the increased bills.
